title: erigeron cedretorum
intro: Erigeron cedretorum, also known as the Syrian fleabane or Cedar-leaved Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountains of Syria and Lebanon. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Erigeron cedretorum often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas or applied topically as a poultice.
